story: On a frost-black night, Detective Varo and his new partner, Alia, traced a trail of dead ravens into the woods. Alia said, 'Let’s wait for backup.' As he crouched to study a carcass, Alia’s phone buzzed; she typed, 'He took the bait. Bring the beak. Right behind him,'  lilac catching in the cold. Ahead, in a dark clearing, a black-clad figure in a beaked mask waited. The wind shifted with rot. Varo keyed his radio; Alia’s voice murmured, 'Right behind you, sir.' He had to choose his next move.
implausible_knowledge: Alia’s phone buzzed; she typed, 'He took the bait. Bring the beak. Right behind him,'  lilac catching in the cold.
question: At the edge of the clearing with the masked figure ahead, what will Varo most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Radio for immediate backup, retreating from the clearing.
answer_without_knowledge: Wave off Alia and move into the clearing to confront the masked figure.
